name: Garlic Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine milk, garlic, and vanilla beans in a saucepan. Bring to a boil and remove from heat.
2. In a mixing bowl, blend cream, sugar, and egg yolks together.
3. Strain the hot milk mixture into the egg and sugar mixture, stirring constantly.
4. Return the combined mixture to the pan and stir continuously over moderate heat until it coats the back of a spoon, about 10-15 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and let cool in an ice bath. Stir in cream. Freeze until firm.
